# `api.lookup.get_items`

> `GET /lookup/items` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.lookup.get_items(*, job_display_id: Optional[int] = None, job_item_id: Optional[str] = None) -> list[LookupItem]
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab lookup get_items [--job-display-id ...] [--job-item-id ...]
```

GET /lookup/items

Args:
    job_display_id: Optional job display ID filter.
    job_item_id: Optional job item ID filter.

## Query parameters — `LookupItemsParams`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `jobDisplayId` | `Optional[int]` | no | Job display ID for item lookup |
| `jobItemId` | `Optional[str]` | no | Job item UUID filter |

## Response

Returns a list of `List[LookupItem]`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | `Optional[str]` | no | Item UUID |
| `name` | `Optional[str]` | no | Item name |
